description: Provision PostgreSQL, manage Apache Kafka, and deploy apps with Aiven - all from your AI assistant.
name: io.aiven/mcp

environmentVariables.description: Aiven API token (create one at https://console.aiven.io/profile/tokens)
environmentVariables.name: AIVEN_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: Set to true to expose only read-only tools
environmentVariables.name: AIVEN_READ_ONLY

environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated scopes to expose (e.g. pg, kafka, pg,kafka, or all). Valid: all, core, pg, kafka, application, integrations.
environmentVariables.name: AIVEN_SERVICES_SCOPE

environmentVariables.description: Set to true to let the connection-info tool return live credentials instead of [REDACTED].
environmentVariables.name: AIVEN_ALLOW_SECRETS

title: Aiven MCP
